positive: A vibrant, highly stylized cosmic flora composition featuring intertwined geometric leaves, celestial nebulae spirals, and bioluminescent jellyfish forms. The artwork must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, designed as a seamless repeating pattern ideal for apparel printing. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blues, vibrant electric teals, stark golds, and crisp white accents. The style should blend Art Deco geometry with ethereal watercolor etching, giving it a sophisticated, vintage, yet futuristic feel. Emphasize clean, sharp silhouettes, strong linework, and dramatic rim lighting to make the glowing elements pop. The overall composition should evoke a sense of wonder and natural symmetry, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, artifacts, poorly drawn, extra limbs, fused limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, grayscale, realistic photography, photorealism, bokeh
